ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., user guide, api documentation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the document */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the revision */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the changes made in this version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the author */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the comment is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the permissions */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document for which permissions are defined */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the document */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the document */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected document */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search query was made */,
  "num_results" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "num_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the document */,
  "num_downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)
